goal: Fix incorrect ledger balance logic, final installment interest, disbursement race condition, and entry number atomicity

tasks.name: Fix ledger debit/credit balance logic (B1)
tasks.action: Add isNormalDebit() to AccountType enum (true for ASSET/EXPENSE, false for LIABILITY/EQUITY/REVENUE). Update LedgerServiceImpl.postEntry() to branch balance update logic by account type.

tasks.name: Fix final installment interest + disbursement race (B3, W8)
tasks.action: In RepaymentScheduleGenerator, ensure final installment interest is computed on actual remaining principal. In LoanServiceImpl.disburseLoan(), remove double save — set status to REPAYING directly before single save.

tasks.name: Fix journal entry number generation (W9)
tasks.action: Create DB sequence via Liquibase changeset. Add native query to JournalEntryRepository. Update generateEntryNumber() to use sequence.

commitMessage: fix(ledger,loan): fix balance logic, interest calc, disbursement race, entry number atomicity
